expected.notes: Entity received capital transfer from foreign person exceeding $100K, triggering Form 3520 advisory; is_nra=yes derived from owner_residency=non_resident.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'advisory_form_3520'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.foreign_capital_transfer eq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
